subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! I behold Thee as the utmost of my yearnings and the greatest of my hopes. Unto Thee do I turn in devoted supplication, and chant the verses of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی ترانی ان اقصی اربی و اعظم آمالی التبتل الیک و ترتیل ایات رحمتک بین
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
